info.title: IMMZD18STBETBEMoscow ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18STBETBEMoscow ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18STBETBEMoscowVS
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18STBETBEMoscowVS.

ValueSet-IMMZD18STBETBEMoscowVS.title: IMMZD18STBETBEMoscow ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD18STBETBEMoscowVS.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18STBETBEMoscow ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: First TBE dose from the primary series was administered-112
Second TBE dose from the primary series was administered-112
Third TBE dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed-89
The primary series has been completed-89
TBE booster dose was administered less than 3 years ago-218

ValueSet-IMMZD18STBETBEMoscowVS.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18STBETBEMoscow ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18STBETBEMoscowVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
